opportunities.title: React Developer:in (m/w/d) im Kölner Startup
opportunities.description:
Du willst mehr sein als ein Byte im Datenmeer? Du möchtest gerne mit Leidenschaft Verantwortung in agilen Teams übernehmen und aktiv mit uns dazu beitragen, die Klimawende voranzutreiben? Dann sollten wir uns unbedingt kennenlernen!

Über uns

Als agiles, grünes Startup und Spezialist für Energiemanagement- und Visualisierungssoftware beteiligen wir uns aktiv an der Gestaltung einer nachhaltigen, klimaneutralen Zukunft. So ist es unsere Mission, mit intuitiver, KI-getriebener Software das Management des Energieverbrauchs so einfach zu machen, dass es für wirklic

opportunities.title: Senior Software Developer (gn)
opportunities.description:
Your mission

The Bikeleasing Group is one of Germany’s leading providers of employer benefits and mobility solutions. With several specialized companies, strong profitable growth and a clear product vision, we are in the midst of a major technical transformation: modernizing legacy systems, building domain-oriented services and strengthening our engineering organization for long-term scalability. opportunities.title: [OSS] P-r-e-m-i-u-m/open-source-starter-lab: Hacktoberfest 2026 contribution badge plan
opportunities.description:
## Goal
Earn the next Hacktoberfest/Holopin badge set the right way: useful pull requests, accepted by maintainers, with no spam and no fake activity.

## What counts
- Register when Hacktoberfest opens.
- Create pull requests during the official October window.
- Target participating repositories or ask maintainers politely for `hacktoberfest-accepted` when the work is real.
- Aim for 6 accepted PR/MRs if the 2026 rules follow the 2025 reward structure.

## What does not count
- Issues only.
- Commits only.
- Random README/name-list changes.
- Spam PRs or low-effort formatting changes.

## Co

opportunities.title: [OSS] vad1ym/vike-i18n-routing: feat: useI18nRoute for React
opportunities.description:
Add a React-specific wrapper around `lib/core/useI18nRoute.ts`, analogous to the existing `lib/vue/useI18nRoute.ts`.

## Proposed API

```ts
import { useI18nRoute } from 'vike-i18n-routing/react'

const { locale, localizePath, setRouteParamVariants } = useI18nRoute(pageContext)
```

## Notes

- Create `lib/react/useI18nRoute.ts`
- Mirror the Vue implementation but use `useMemo` / `useCallback` instead of `computed`
- Export from `lib/index.ts` under a `/react` subpath
- Add to package exports map in `package.json`

opportunities.title: [OSS] kubestellar/console: bug: updateSingleClusterInCache skips metric sharing when all updates are zero due to falsy || check in shared.ts
opportunities.description:
**Type:** bug  
**Target:** Console Application  
**Component:** `web/src/hooks/mcp/shared.ts` — Line 594

The bug exists in the current main branch and can be verified at:
https://github.com/kubestellar/console/blob/main/web/src/hooks/mcp/shared.ts#L594

## Describe the Bug

`updateSingleClusterInCache` uses `||` to check whether any metric
fields were updated before calling `shareMetricsBetweenSameServerClusters`:

```ts
// shared.ts:594 — UNSAFE
if (updates.nodeCount || updates.podCount || updates.cpuCores || updates.memoryGB ||
    updates.storageGB || updates.cpuRequestsCores || updates.m
